438.issue_title: Feature: Implement dynamic state file versioning

cycles.name: C_EXC_VALIDATOR.1

deliverables.description: Custom state exceptions (StateNotFoundError, StateCorruptedError, StateVersionMismatchError, PlanningVersionMismatchError) subclassing ConfigError exist in exceptions.py.
StateVersionValidator implementation in state_version_validator.py with validate_file and backup_file methods.
Unit tests for StateVersionValidator covering missing, corrupt, and mismatched file cases.

cycles.exit_criteria: StateVersionValidator unit tests pass successfully, and exceptions inherit from ConfigError.

cycles.name: C_MODELS_PROJECT.2

deliverables.description: BranchState and QualityState models updated to include schema_version with default '1.0.0'.
ProjectManager updated to use lazy validation on load (_read_projects) and wrap all write paths in the schema envelope (_write_deliverables).
Outdated deliverables migration/validation tests hard-removed from the test suite.

cycles.exit_criteria: ProjectManager successfully validates SemVer envelope on load and persists envelope on save. Outdated tests are completely removed.

cycles.name: C_REPO_TOOL.3

deliverables.description: FileStateRepository and FileQualityStateRepository load paths integrated with StateVersionValidator for version checking and backup.
PhaseStateEngine reconstruct fallback removed, and StateReconstructor class deleted.
GetWorkContextTool execute() updated to catch only StateNotFoundError.
All legacy tests for _load_state_or_reconstruct and StateReconstructor are hard-removed from test files.

cycles.exit_criteria: Repositories correctly check version and backup on mismatch. Fallbacks and reconstruct code/tests are hard-removed. Bootstrapper is refactored.

cycles.name: C_VALIDATION_GATES.4

deliverables.description: Integration tests verify corrupt/mismatched files correctly trigger ConfigErrorOutput without traceback crashes.
Run quality gates on all changed Python files with overall pass: True.

cycles.exit_criteria: Integration tests pass successfully, and quality gates are green.
